scripts.build:deploy: npm run prayer:snapshot && npm run build
scripts.build:native: npm run typecheck && npm run icon:verify && vite build --config vite.native.config.ts
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build:native && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios:run: npm run ios:sync && npx cap run ios
scripts.ios:verify: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -quiet -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO build
scripts.ios:archive-verify: xcodebuild -quiet -project ios/App/App.xcodeproj -scheme App -configuration Release -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -archivePath build/SafarMate.xcarchive CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO archive
scripts.test: rm -rf dist-test && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir dist-test && node scripts/run-tests.mjs
scripts.android:sync: npm run build:native && npx cap sync android
